# launchdarkly_oauth_client (Data Source)

Provides a LaunchDarkly OAuth 2.0 client data source.

This data source allows you to retrieve information about a registered LaunchDarkly OAuth 2.0 client by its client ID.

-> **Note:** The client secret is not available through this data source. LaunchDarkly only returns it once, upon creation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "launchdarkly_oauth_client" "internal_dashboard" {
  client_id = "562px796b9eb22d01f6e0a8"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client_id` (String) The OAuth 2.0 client's unique client ID.

### Read-Only

- `account_id` (String) The ID of the account the OAuth 2.0 client is registered under.
- `creation_date` (Number) The OAuth 2.0 client's creation date represented as a Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds.
- `description` (String) The description of the OAuth 2.0 client.
- `id` (String) The OAuth 2.0 client's unique client ID. This is the same value as `client_id`.
- `name` (String) The human-friendly name for the OAuth 2.0 client.
- `redirect_uri` (String) The redirect URI for the OAuth 2.0 client.
